indications.text:
Diovan HCT (valsartan and hydrochlorothiazide, USP) is indicated for the treatment of hypertension, to lower blood
pressure. Lowering blood pressure reduces the risk of fatal and nonfatal cardiovascular events, primarily strokes
and myocardial infarctions. These benefits have been seen in controlled...

Diovan HCT® (valsartan and hydrochlorothiazide, USP) is indicated for the treatment of
hypertension. This fixed dose combination is not indicated for initial therapy (see DOSAGE
AND ADMINISTRATION).
